'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 134''' was the one hundred thirty-fourth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 21]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Chris Gardner]], [[Matthew Harvey]] and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*[[:Category:Libraries|Libraries]]

*[[Conner net]]
